title: Preserve literal shell payloads across durable dispatch
goal: Preserve the exact argv and shell-script bytes supplied to durable task dispatch so shell variables, heredocs and foreign template syntax are evaluated only by the intended runtime, never prematurely by the connector or dispatch serialization layer.

approval.note: Trace and fix serialization across the complete connector-to-launcher path. Do not enable generic synchronous shell execution or implicit environment expansion.

acceptance.assertion: Request parsing, receipt serialization, durable store, launcher construction and systemd execution preserve every argv element exactly; the executed argv digest equals the accepted request digest.

Strings containing ${cluster}, ${expected}, $HOME, command substitutions, heredocs or GitHub ${{ ... }} syntax are not expanded, formatted or templated by Grabowski unless the selected typed operation explicitly declares an exact-token placeholder contract.
Existing typed operation placeholders remain allowlisted, exact-token-only and separate from arbitrary task argv; unknown placeholders fail before execution rather than becoming empty strings.
The fix does not broaden shell authority, import caller environment secrets or weaken argv validation, canonical digest binding, output limits or durable routing.

End-to-end tests pass literal variable forms through MCP request, task database, systemd launcher and a probe process, covering empty caller variables, Unicode, quotes, newlines, heredocs and nested template syntax.
A deployed durable task writes a receipt proving literal ${cluster} and ${expected} reached the shell and were expanded there, while the stored and launched argv digests remain identical.

live_reproduction.observed_behavior: ${cluster} and ${expected} were replaced with empty strings before bash execution, producing a false check against -.json although the underlying proof receipt was correct.
live_reproduction.consequence: A valid Direct proof was wrapped by a false negative and required a second literal-path verification.

does_not_establish: that bash performed the premature expansion
permission to accept arbitrary template substitution
that all earlier task receipts are affected
metadata.verification_note: PR #323 fixed premature systemd environment expansion but its first mechanism was incompatible with productive systemd 249. PR #324 replaced it with reversible dollar escaping only in the systemd transport argv, preserving accepted/stored argv and digest. The exact merged hotfix was deployed and both persistent-task and durable-job probes preserved shell variables, command substitution, GitHub template syntax, heredoc syntax and dollar literals until the intended shell.

validation.ci: GitHub validate Python 3.10/3.12 and CodeQL passed on the final reviewed hotfix head

validated_acceptance.byte-preserving-path: PASS: Persistent task lifecycle receipt preserves request argv SHA-256 c28fd4db...; durable job metadata/finalization preserve argv SHA-256 c46bd5ca... and final status succeeded.
validated_acceptance.no-implicit-expansion: PASS: Live output retained $HOME, $(uname), ${{ github.sha }}, <<EOF and $$ literally while ${cluster}/${expected} expanded only inside the intended shell to alpha/beta.
validated_acceptance.typed-placeholders-only: PASS: Head/diff-bound PR #324 self-review found no parser, allowlist or typed-placeholder authority broadening.
validated_acceptance.security-boundary: PASS: The final fix only reversibly escapes dollar signs in systemd transport argv; canonical accepted/stored argv and digest remain unchanged and no shell/environment/privilege authority was broadened.
validated_acceptance.tests: PASS: 223 affected tests plus focused systemd-249 compatibility checks passed; GitHub validate 3.10/3.12 and CodeQL passed on the final reviewed head.
validated_acceptance.live-proof: PASS: Exact merge 224e5b3c was deployed. Persistent task 7eec268... completed successfully and durable job grabowski-job-8977795735f3 finalized succeeded with the expected literal roundtrip.
